name: editor-status
author: lumine-code
description: Show the active file path and a Liquid-templated cursor position, selection range, and cursor count in the status bar.

template.title: Template
template.description: Select the information shown in the editor status tile. Choose `Custom` to use the template below, or `Hide` to hide the tile.
enum: Row and Column, Lines and Chars
template.default: Row and Column, Lines and Chars

custom.title: Custom Template
custom.description: Liquid template used when `Template` is `Custom`. Variables: `start.row`, `start.col` (where the selection begins, or the cursor when nothing is selected), `end.row`, `end.col` (where the cursor is; equals `start` with no selection), `lines`, `chars` (selected line and character counts), and `n` (number of cursors). `start` and `end` follow the selection's direction. Supports tags such as `{% if chars %}-{{ end.row }}:{{ end.col }}{% endif %}`.
custom.default: {{ start.row }}:{{ start.col }}{% if chars %}-{{ end.row }}:{{ end.col }}{% endif %}{% if n > 1 %} #{{ n }}{% endif %}
